paragraphs: F180 is a pineapple selection that was imported into Australia from Hawaii and is grown commercially here, rather than being a locally bred Queensland clone. It belongs to the broader family of Hawaiian-derived pineapple selections.
It is a large, vigorous plant that carries correspondingly large fruit, placing it among the bigger-fruited pineapple types grown in Australia.

claims.text: F180 is a pineapple selection imported into Australia from Hawaii and grown commercially here.
F180 is a large, vigorous plant that produces large fruit.

sources.name: GardenDrum, How to grow pineapples for flowers, fruit and foliage
